'''dakasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kween|kween]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-k-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kween|kween]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dakasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dækæshæth|dækæshæth]] || [[word:dækæshæj|dækæshæj]] || [[word:dækæshæsh|dækæshæsh]] || [[word:dækæshæ|dækæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dakakashath|dakakashath]] || [[word:dakakashaj|dakakashaj]] || [[word:dakakashash|dakakashash]] || [[word:dakakasha|dakakasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dakashath|dakashath]] || [[word:dakashaj|dakashaj]] || [[word:dakashash|dakashash]] || [[word:dakasha|dakasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dakafshath|dakafshath]] || [[word:dakafshaj|dakafshaj]] || [[word:dakafshash|dakafshash]] || [[word:dakafshaf|dakafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dakashatha|dakashatha]] || [[word:dakashaja|dakashaja]] || [[word:dakashasha|dakashasha]] || [[word:dakashaka|dakashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dakashath|dakashath]] || [[word:dakashaj|dakashaj]] || [[word:dakashash|dakashash]] || [[word:dakasha|dakasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dakashathal|dakashathal]] || [[word:dakashajal|dakashajal]] || [[word:dakashashal|dakashashal]] || [[word:dakashakal|dakashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dakashathatha|dakashathatha]] || [[word:dakashajaja|dakashajaja]] || [[word:dakashashasha|dakashashasha]] || [[word:dakashaka|dakashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dakashathan|dakashathan]] || [[word:dakashajan|dakashajan]] || [[word:dakashashan|dakashashan]] || [[word:dakashakan|dakashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dakashathaoro|dakashathaoro]] || [[word:dakashajaoro|dakashajaoro]] || [[word:dakashashaoro|dakashashaoro]] || [[word:dakashakaoro|dakashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
